name: Sukkot (Jerusalem)
traditions: Building decorative sukkot across the city; priestly blessing at Western Wall; water libation ceremony; Simchat Beit HaShoeva celebrations.
historicalBackground: Jerusalem's Sukkot celebrations center on the Temple Mount traditions described in the Torah, including the unique priestly blessing with thousands attending.
description: The ancient harvest pilgrimage to Jerusalem, where the city fills with decorated sukkot and joyous celebrations at the Western Wall.
